title: Claude at Work: Professional Mastery

modules.title: What Makes Claude Different: Strengths, Limits, and Design Philosophy
modules.sub: Understanding Claude's architecture, values, and professional capabilities
modules.description: Learners map out what genuinely distinguishes Claude from other large language models, including its constitutional AI design and reasoning tendencies. They assess where Claude excels and where its principled constraints create boundaries, building a clear mental model they can apply immediately at work.

modules.title: Prompt Engineering for Claude's Reasoning Style
modules.sub: Crafting prompts that align with how Claude thinks and responds
modules.description: Learners study the specific patterns and structures that draw out Claude's strongest analytical responses, moving beyond generic prompt tips to techniques tuned for Claude's reasoning style. They draft and iterate on prompts for their own professional context, testing what produces the most reliable, high-quality output.

modules.title: High-Stakes Use Cases: Analysis, Drafting, and Decision Support
modules.sub: Applying Claude to complex professional tasks that require judgment
modules.description: Learners work through realistic professional scenarios—synthesizing research, drafting critical documents, and framing decisions—using Claude as a thought partner. They evaluate output quality critically and develop personal checklists for when and how to trust Claude's contributions in consequential work.

modules.title: Working Within Claude's Values and Safety Guardrails
modules.sub: Navigating refusals, limitations, and ethical boundaries productively
modules.description: Learners examine the reasoning behind Claude's safety behaviors and learn to distinguish hard limits from navigable constraints. They practice reframing requests and adjusting workflows so that guardrails become predictable features to design around rather than unexpected blockers.

modules.title: Advanced Features, API Access, and Workflow Integration
modules.sub: Embedding Claude into recurring professional systems and pipelines
modules.description: Learners explore Claude's advanced capabilities—including system prompts, API access, and tool integrations—and evaluate which features fit their specific workflow needs. They finish by designing a concrete integration plan for at least one high-value recurring task, ready to deploy and refine in practice.

synopsis: Claude is built around a distinct set of values and reasoning behaviors that make it exceptionally capable for professional knowledge work â if you know how to work with it. This focused course moves you from casual user to power practitioner, covering Claude's unique strengths, its principled limitations, and the workflows where it delivers the highest return.
rationale: Claude's growing adoption in enterprise and knowledge work contexts means professionals who understand its reasoning model and design philosophy will extract significantly more value than those treating it as a generic chatbot.
learning_outcome: Configure and apply Claude to at least one high-value recurring task in your professional workflow, with clear strategies for handling its safety guardrails and reasoning characteristics.
source_signals: Opus 4.5 is not the normal AI agent experience that I have had thus far (score: 4938)
nearest_existing: Constitutional AI: The Architecture of Values
